summary: Attach to tmux sessions even when saved names differ from the live server.

fixed: tmux attach resolves the live session name before connecting, so cards labeled hugeshop-infra-iac attach even when Nucleus had a stale hugeshop-infra-iac_1_0 target
tmux attach and destroy commands on session cards use the resolved live name
saved tmux session order migrates stale names to match live sessions on refresh
